title: Book Reviews
abstract: Books reviewed in this article: Cohen, Stanley, States of Denial: Knowing about Atrocities and Suffering Davie, Grace, Religion in Modern Europe: A Memory Mutates Kaspersen, Lars Bo, Anthony Giddens: An Introduction to a Social Theorist Giddens, Anthony, The Third Way and its Critics Hakim, Catherine, Work‐Lifestyle Choices in the 21st Century: Preference Theory Kiple, K.F. and Ornelas, K.C. (eds), The Cambridge World History of Food Young, Jock, The Exclusive Society: Crime and Difference in Late Modernity
